prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion model. Historical daily returns for SYK over the last 5 years were used to estimate the average daily return (mu = 0.000609) and daily volatility (sigma = 0.012581). The point estimate represents the median of the predicted log-normal price distribution after 6 trading days. Confidence intervals are derived from the quantiles of this log-normal distribution, considering the current price of $386.06 and a 6-day horizon.
